label: Subagent • live spawn_model structured analysis digest
query: Spawn a bare model to produce a short structured analysis.
notes: LIVE. Runs the host + TextSubagentKind in MODEL mode (the spawn_model path) — a bare spawnable model id with NO agent/system prompt — on the RUN model, so spawn_model is a real cross-model column. seedSpawnableModel adds the run model to the Default agent's global spawnable model pool (and enables the local handoff) for the run and tears it down after. Asserts a success spawn_result whose digest is a numbered three-item list — an instruction-following discriminator with NO agent steering (unlike spawn-live-analysis). SKIPS only when the run model isn't ready.

subagent.input: List exactly three distinct, concrete use cases for a bounded subagent. Output one numbered line per use case and nothing else.
